item.title: Commuters Near Silver Spring Report 'Unidentified Breakfast Object' Rumored in Empty Grocery Aisle, Prompting Sharp U-Turns in Morning Leftover Routes
item.description: County officials scramble as rectangular glow isn't last night's meatloaf — possible cereal encounter protocols enacted.

item.title: Suburban Families Brace for Cable Ferry Madness: Download Slots Now Require Time Travel
item.description: Residents submit paperwork faster than their downloads. Who knew patching could rival holiday planning?

item.title: Fort Lee Film Commission Signs PATH Accord: Celebrities Now Required to Arrive on Time
item.description: New treaty gives stars a 45-minute buffer zone and inspectors tasked with preventing ‘non-proliferation of missed call sheets.’

item.title: Midwest CEO's Rolled-Over Snooze Unlocks Tariff Talks, White House Hails 'Snooze Accord'
item.description: The fate of international trade now rests on one executive's decision to linger in bed.

item.title: US-Saudi Melee Accord Standardizes Polite Shoving at Oil Terminal Counters
item.description: Supply chain chaos escalates as diplomacy greets its inevitable, elbowing offspring.

item.title: National Schedule Standardization Agency Laid to Rest Between 'Before Lunch-ish' and 'After Snack-ish'
item.description: Agency that once dictated precise appointment slots now memorialized for its enduring dedication to delightful ambiguity.

item.title: U.S. Treasury Celebrates Historic Non-Null Nuclear Settlement with Saudi Arabia
item.description: Pact Cited as Triumph of Positive Numerals; Abacus Inspectors Brace for Deluge of Fines

item.title: Passengers to Arm Themselves for Safer Zeppelin Travel
item.description: Transatlantic Dirigible Council Announces Revolutionary 'Liberty Lounge' Experience, Just Pack Your Heat!

item.title: National Morning Meal Standards Board Officially Defunded, Leaves Behind Mountain of Reheated Meatloaf
item.description: Ghost of Bureaucracy Haunts Silver Spring as Legacy of Lunch-for-Breakfast Oversight Comes to a Grim Halt

item.title: Exact Words Accord Sparks Nationwide Military Deployment After Pothole Statement
item.description: Local DMV Issues Emergency Sirens in Response to Literal Press Releases
